content: State-of-the-art 2024-2025 active learning agents can leverage Transformer attention’s built-in positional and contextual encoding to implement curiosity-driven active selection of episodic memories, where the agent’s intrinsic reward is tied to the attention weight entropy of unintegrated past experiences. This creates a closed-loop system where the agent actively prioritizes remembering ambiguous, high-learning-gain episodic events instead of passively storing all encountered data.
source_topics: Transformer attention mechanism for episodic memory
